title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
* Cash withdrawal limit of Rs. 25,000/- and make purchases worth Rs. 25,000/- in a day at Point of Sale (POS).
  * 1 loyalty point for every Rs. 100 spent on the Debit Card


Withdrawal limits are Rs. 25,000/- at the ATM and Rs. 50,000/- at POS. Limits are per day/per card and are subject to the available balance in the customer’s account. 
The Classic Debit Card can be used both in India and abroad to make purchases at Merchant locations and withdraw local currency at ATMs. The customer is debited in INR. All transactions are reflected in the account statement in INR and merchant location details are captured. 
We make tie-ups with different merchants from time to time to offer discounts to our Debit Card holders. Customers can avail of this discount by making purchases through the Debit Card at these merchant locations. 
The Debit Card can be used online, for shopping, booking air/rail/movie tickets & utility bill payments. 
Receive instant SMS alerts on transaction made on your Card. 
Customers are covered with an insurance cover upto Rs. 1 lac for lost and counterfeit cards. 
_*Effective 1st July 2013, for Insurance claims to be accepted and processed; there should be a minimum of 2 purchase transactions using the Debit Card in last 3 months prior to the event date._
Customers will gain one loyalty point for every Rs. 100 spent on the Debit Card. 
_# Loyalty point reward structure as well as reward of loyalty points for different merchant_  
*Fee depends upon SOF of Scheme code of account under which account is opened.
As Mastercard Classic Debit Card are issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details 
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)
